project_type: Single-file offline HTML app (el-dimensionering.html) with Node.js test harness
build_system: None - single HTML file, no build pipeline
test_framework: Custom Node.js test runner (test-sld.js) with assert module
verification_instructions: Run 'node test-sld.js' and confirm 0 failures. Currently 1344 tests on main.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - just Node.js for running tests
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - no npm install, no CDN. All code must be inline in the HTML file. The app is 100% offline/self-contained.
contribution_requirements: Single-file HTML app, trilingual (Danish/English/Farsi), life-safety-critical, click-only UI (no typing affordances except the paste textarea). All libraries must be embedded inline.
key_patterns: Functions prefixed with 'analyzer' for the Project Analyzer module. State object 'analyzerState'. Translation via tx() function with _FA dictionary for Farsi. Tests added as additive blocks at end of test-sld.js before the Summary section.
relevant_files: test-sld.js (tests added before // --- Summary --- at EOF)
directory_structure: Single-file app: el-dimensionering.html (~29106 lines), test-sld.js (~13264 lines after rebase)
